chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1450 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.08.2025 For orders on office objections For hearing of MA 5662/25 For hearing of main case Mr. Koura Khan Memon, Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G. along with Insp. Muhammad Changal for SSP Hyderabad, SIP Ali Mardan PS Sadhuja district Naushahro Feroze, I.O / SIP Dileejan PS Qasimabad, Petitioners are called absent. I.O has produced 164 Cr.P.C. Statement of Petitioner No.1 Mst. Ansaran made by her before the Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-II, Moro. In the statement, the petitioner No.1 has stated that she has married to Petitioner No.2 with her consent and no one has abducted her and the FIR registered against her husband is false. I.O states that he shall file report before the concerned Magistrate under Section 173 Cr.P.C. He shall do so within seven days from today. The concerned Magistrate shall pass orders in accordance with law on the report so submitted by the I.O. As far as the grievance of the private respondent, if any, is concerned, he is at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of his grievance, if so advised. In the meantime, legal protection shall be provided to the petitioners as and when required. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
